scripts.setup:uv: command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && source $HOME/.local/bin/env); uv sync
scripts.setup: bun install; bun run setup:uv; bun run setup:pyodide
scripts.build:py: .venv/bin/python -m meta_builder -o legacy/draw_io_parser.py && bun run lint:fix:py && bun run format:py
scripts.build:ts: bun run scripts/build.ts && cp dist/rdfexport.js .. && bun run lint:fix:ts && bun run format:ts
scripts.build: bun run build:py && bun run build:ts
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run debug:all && bun run test:pytest:all && bun run test:bun:all
scripts.test:all:log:macos: bun run test:log:macos && bun run debug:all:log:macos && bun run test:pytest:all:log:macos && bun run test:bun:all:log:macos
scripts.test:all:log:linux: bun run test:log:linux && bun run debug:all:log:linux && bun run test:pytest:all:log:linux && bun run test:bun:all:log:linux
scripts.format: bun run format:py; bun run format:ts
scripts.format:check: bun run format:check:py; bun run format:check:ts
scripts.lint: bun run lint:py; bun run lint:ts
scripts.lint:fix: bun run lint:fix:py; bun run lint:fix:ts
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check
scripts.fix: bun run lint:fix && bun run format
